testcase.name: webClient_isAutoInstrumented

testcase.name: scheduledMethod_failureEmitsFailedHeartbeatAndReraises

testcase.name: webClient_failurePath_doesNotCrashAndStillRecords
testcase.system-out:
2026-04-22T18:22:37.067+03:00  INFO 92394 --- [stak-flush-logs] dev.allstak.sdk                          : [AllStak SDK DEBUG] Flushing 1 logs item(s)
2026-04-22T18:22:37.067+03:00  INFO 92394 --- [stak-flush-logs] dev.allstak.sdk                          : [AllStak SDK DEBUG] Sending to http://localhost:55161/ingest/v1/logs: {"level":"error","message":"Unexpected error occurred in scheduled task
java.lang.IllegalStateException: scheduled boom
  at at dev.allstak.spring.AutoInstrumentationIntegrationTest$ScheduledHitCounter.boom(AutoInstrumentationIntegrationTest.java:296)
  at at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:104)

  at at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1474)","service":"auto-test","environment":"auto-test","release":"v1.0.0-auto"}

testcase.name: restTemplate_builderPath_isAutoInstrumented
scheduledMethod_successEmitsHeartbeatAutomatically
testcase.system-out:
